name: fileio
description: File I/O and string formatting primitives. Read/write text and binary files, format strings with interpolation.
author: Phograph Team

primitives.name: file-read-text
primitives.description: Read an entire text file and return its contents as a string. Input: file path.

primitives.name: file-write-text
primitives.description: Write a string to a text file (creates or overwrites). Inputs: file path, content. Output: file path on success.

primitives.name: file-append-text
primitives.description: Append a string to a text file (creates if missing). Inputs: file path, content. Output: file path on success.

primitives.name: file-read-lines
primitives.description: Read a text file and return a list of lines. Input: file path.

primitives.name: file-write-lines
primitives.description: Write a list of lines to a text file with newline separators. Inputs: file path, list of strings. Output: file path on success.

primitives.name: file-read-bytes
primitives.description: Read a file as raw binary data. Input: file path. Output: byte list.

primitives.name: file-write-bytes
primitives.description: Write raw binary data to a file. Inputs: file path, byte list. Output: file path on success.

primitives.name: file-exists
primitives.description: Check whether a file exists at the given path. Input: file path. Output: boolean.

primitives.name: file-delete
primitives.description: Delete a file at the given path. Input: file path. Output: boolean success.

primitives.name: file-size
primitives.description: Return the size of a file in bytes. Input: file path.

primitives.name: dir-list
primitives.description: List the contents of a directory. Input: directory path. Output: list of filenames.

primitives.name: dir-create
primitives.description: Create a directory (and parents if needed). Input: directory path. Output: path on success.

primitives.name: path-join
primitives.description: Join two path components with the platform path separator. Inputs: base path, child path.

primitives.name: path-extension
primitives.description: Return the file extension from a path (e.g. "txt" from "notes.txt").

primitives.name: path-basename
primitives.description: Return the filename component of a path (e.g. "notes.txt" from "/tmp/notes.txt").

primitives.name: path-dirname
primitives.description: Return the directory component of a path (e.g. "/tmp" from "/tmp/notes.txt").

primitives.name: fmt
primitives.description: Format a template string with values from a dict. Placeholders use {key} syntax like Python f-strings. Input 1: template (e.g. "Hello {name}, you are {age}"). Input 2: dict of key-value pairs.

primitives.name: fmt-list
primitives.description: Format a template string with positional values from a list. Placeholders use {0}, {1}, etc. Input 1: template (e.g. "{0} + {1} = {2}"). Input 2: list of values.

primitives.name: fmt-pad-left
primitives.description: Pad a string on the left to a target width. Inputs: string, width, pad character.

primitives.name: fmt-pad-right
primitives.description: Pad a string on the right to a target width. Inputs: string, width, pad character.

primitives.name: fmt-number
primitives.description: Format a number with a specified number of decimal places. Inputs: number, decimal places.

primitives.name: fmt-join
primitives.description: Join a list of strings with a separator. Inputs: list of strings, separator string.
